text: kūrmapurāṇam-1 atha śrīkūrmapurāṇam pūrvavibhāgaḥ nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam / devīṃ sarasvatīṃ caiva tato jayamudīrayet //
iti śrīkūrmapurāṇe ṣaṭsāhastryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ pūrvavibhāge prathamo 'dhyāyaḥ

tyaktvā varāhasaṃsthānaṃ saṃsthāpya ca suradvijān svāmeva prakṛtiṃ divyāṃ yayau viṣṇuḥ paraṃ padam //
andhaka uvāca namāmi mūrdhnā bhagavantamekaṃ samāhitā yaṃ vidurīśatattvam / purātanaṃ puṇyamanantarūpaṃ kālaṃ kaviṃ yogaviyogahetum //

śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca namo 'stu te śāśvata sarvayone brahmādhipaṃ tvāmṛṣayo vadanti / tapaśca sattvaṃ ca rajastamaśca tvāmeva sarva pravadanti santaḥ //

sahastraśīrṣā bhūtvāhaṃ sahastrākṣaḥ sahastrapāt sahastrabāhuryuktātmā śayito 'haṃ sanātanaḥ //
